name: Tien Seng
translated_text: I had a great time here! The food was pretty good, especially the fried items that were crispy and flavorful. 🍤 The staff were super friendly and attentive, making the visit really pleasant. 😊 The atmosphere was nice and comfortable too. Definitely a good spot for a meal! 🍣✨

name: 之家爱
translated_text: The worst sushi mentai I have ever eaten

name: Gtf
translated_text: My experience at this restaurant was quite disappointing. 😟 Upon entering, despite no queue, I was informed there was no Wi-Fi to order. 📶 It was frustrating to be told I had to use my own phone to place an order. 😠 The lack of basic service was a major drawback. 🤦‍♀️

name: 11 Britney
translated_text: The quality control of the food needs to be strengthened, and the food will look ugly.I asked for sushi but it didn't come for a long time. I asked the service staff and he said he didn't see the sushi being placed there before he brought it to me. Lack of manpower is also a big problem.

name: Jen Yee
translated_text:
If the ingredients are sold out that day, a notification can be given to the customer when they come in instead of being informed after ordering that the ingredients are not available. It is a miracle that the service can still maintain 4.1🌟

So many employees were talking and there was no notice. Only one informed us that there was no salmon during the second round of ordering. Please, the service can be better.

I have been here many many times already. In my mind, Sushi Mentai is the best CP value Japanese sushi shop in Melaka. Always my go-to shop when I crave Japanese food. The food is delicious and at a reasonable price. The sushi has a lot of variety, really fulfilling and delicious. The service also very good, the workers are very diligent, hardworking and fast in movement.
Just one comment...the sauce plates some times still have soy sauce stains. However overall 10/10

name: Chee Wei Tey

It is mostly filled with fried eggs, fried potato. All the salmon and other fish have to be order from their QR. Then it needs more than 10 minutes just to serve my salmon. The worker are often looking grumpy. Whenever I try to call them for count plate and ask where's my QR order sushi, they will ignore me and only staring at the floor.

The food came out and it was a "surprise". All the plates, bowls and cups were made of plastic. So many people come every day. No money?Can't afford a bowl?Not available?There are so many waiters that they can’t wash the dishes?It's only because your products are cheap that so many people come. The service is terrible.

After entering it once for a long time, I still missed the order.Even when serving dishes, there may be problems.There was no polite answer either.We ordered 8 glasses of water and only 4 glasses came. When we asked politely, they just answered how many more glasses there were.

name: Amira Amin
translated_text: I love this sushi but take away condiment is too little.

name: LT Wong
translated_text:
On Wednesday 2nd July 2025, we visited Sushi Mentai in Malim Jaya. Surprisingly, at 6:30 PM, we were able to get seats without having to queue, which is uncommon as there’s usually a queue of 3 to 4 tables by 6 PM on weekends.

Our all-time favorite is the SP12, which is salmon topped with some crunchy tempura and cucumber. The taste is delightful, especially after 80% of the salmon surface is lightly torched. It’s a dish we always enjoy.

The space, however, is quite cramped and narrow, leaving little room for children to move around. It’s something to consider if dining with kids.

As for pricing, each red plate costs RM3 and each yellow plate is RM2. Hot tea is priced at RM1 per glass. For a total of 12 red plates and 7 yellow plates, shared among three adults, our total bill came to RM60. It’s a pretty affordable option for Japanese food.

name: Zhe Wei Teoh
translated_text: I ordered a bowl of noodles. The noodles were ready, but no one went to get them. After waiting for a long time, I found that the noodles were ready at the door of the meal. The noodles were cold. I talked to the waiter, but the waiter replied o .

name: Yunice
translated_text: A solid option for affordable yet quality sushi in Melaka

name: Jin Lim
translated_text:
Staff super unfriendly, as if the customers owe them money. The menus weren't even taken away when the food was served. Waiters who served our food basically shoved it onto our table. We ordered a side dish and IT WAS PASSED TO US OVER THE CONVEYOR BELT. Absolutely terrible service.

If the service was bad and the food was good, it might be excusable, but the food was not even good. The ramen broth was water, lacking in flavor. The ramen itself has this weird soggy texture.
Side note: I wish they would separate the tempura from the udon. It's one small thing to do that's logical.

The only redeeming quality is the price. It's cheaper than a lot of the Japanese places in Melaka. But if I were you, I wouldn't waste this money.

name: AllwithMuniq

translated_text: This is my first time and my last time here. The service attitude is so bad...the staff is not polite to take the order and just pull it..I am impatient...I am a bit fat with glasses and blue clothes..Isn't it that I come here to eat for free and get paid...as if we customers owe you...

name: Grayson Gan
translated_text: I had lunch today at Sushi Mentai (Malim branch) and unfortunately, the experience was quite disappointing. The sushi rice was a bit hard and loosely packed (松散), which affected the overall texture. The wasabi also lacked flavour. Service-wise, the staff's attitude left room for improvement, and the serving speed was very slow. I hope the management can look into these issues to improve the dining experience for future customers.

name: Tootuu
translated_text: The food here is tasty and affordable. But, for the business owner,please take note of your restaurant condition and staffing needs. When afternoon comes, with Malaysia's hot weather. Your four big airconds no longer functioning well. Even more when the restaurant is loaded with people(full house). The seating arrangement is too crowded, not suitable for families with small kids. You want to earn so much at one time by putting such many seats. But, the comfort level is compromised. Your staffs weren't happy working, all drenched with sweat. They also quarreled in front of customers. How can they prepare hygienic food and provide quality services?the dirty used mop is left near the sink area at the toilet entrance. A small girl who just wanted to go for a hand wash got their dress all wet from the dirty mop. Oh my God. Horrible experience coming here. I think I made a written-complaint before regarding the facilities and services, but seems like no actions taken. Today, I decided to take this to google review. One day, your business will suffer if you let these petty issues prolong,without putting your customers'and staffs' needs first.

name: CY KK

One of the staff used the same cloth to wipe both the table and the chair cushions. I reminded the staff on the spot not to do that, but he ignored me and continued wiping several chairs. Some chairs had a lot of food crumbs, and the staff wiped the entire surface, while for others, he used the cloth to pick up the crumbs directly.

name: Yan TieZheng
translated_text:
This is the most popular Japanese sushi restaurant in Malacca. The price is affordable (it is much cheaper than traditional Japanese restaurants) and it is suitable for the whole family to eat together. Therefore, there are many people at different times of the day. There is even a queue during meal time. There are often many people sitting and waiting outside the store.

The taste of the food is not exquisite or amazing, but it is still satisfactory and satisfying.

The price of the revolving sushi is very cheap. I like the various snacks here (fried food, steamed eggs, egg rolls, etc.). I don’t like the taste of ramen very much. Rice would be better. It depends on personal preference.

I'm sitting next to the table he clearing,  it's so desperate and he do it like no body business.  We as customer dine in , and as staff you want clearing should do it lightly,  then only we felt calm. Even I want to answer a call also need to walk out from the restaurant.  Really unbelievable, hope management of Sushi mentai will make changes about this part .
